params.name: Divine Comedy
params.source:
* Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wishing (0.08%)
* Lottery Value Pack III ($99.99)
params.description: On Sep 1, 1320 AD, Dante completed "Divine Comedy" which inspired The Renaissance. The "Divine Comedy" consists of 100 chapters, with 33 cantos in each of the 3 cantiche and 1 introduction. The poem tells of the story of Dante 20 years ago, who lost his way in a dark forest in the morning before Easter and me the Roman poet Virgil. Virgil guided Dante through the hell that punished the sinful souls, the purgatory that contained the souls of the repentance, and finally the nine celestial spheres  …
